message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontName Courier New skinparam classFontSize 14 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classFontColor black skinparam classStereotypeFontName Courier New skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 14 skinparam classStereotypeFontColor black skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #B8D8B8 skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor black class Animal { } class Gos { } class PastorAlemany { } Animal <|-- Gos Gos <|-- PastorAlemany note right of Animal C end note note right of Gos C end note note right of PastorAlemany C end note @enduml
